data.title: Yiwu merchants in stationery industry expanding globally, Huang Changchao leads initiative 3 years ago.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Beijing, the focus for Yiwu merchants has increasingly shifted towards expanding internationally. Leading this charge is Huang Changchao, the President of the Yiwu Stationery & Cultural Products Industry Association, who was one of the pioneers in venturing abroad. His decision to lead this initiative was made three years ago, and since then, there has been a significant increase in the number of Yiwu merchants looking to establish a presence in foreign markets. Huang Changchao's efforts have been instrumental in promoting global expansion within the Yiwu business community.

data.title: Phase III trial results of MET inhibition in NSCLC patients published in The Lancet. Confirms efficacy in patients with acquired MET amplification after prior EGFR-TKI treatment.
data.description: A groundbreaking Phase III trial has provided confirmation of the effectiveness of MET inhibition in individuals with advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) who have acquired MET amplification following treatment with previous EGFR-TKI therapy. This study marks the first randomized trial of its kind and highlights the promising outcomes in this patient population. The results revealed a significant increase in survival rates among participants, with a notable reduction in tumor progression. This development signifies a major advancement in the treatment of NSCLC, with implications for improving outcomes for a substantial number of patients.

data.title: Seef Properties in Bahrain adopts Yardi's Real Estate Cloud Technology for operational efficiency and innovation.
data.description: A prominent real estate developer in Bahrain has prioritized proptech and digital transformation as key components of its operational strategy. Seef Properties, a top integrated real estate development and asset management company based in Manama, Bahrain, has actively embraced innovation to drive its business forward. This strategic approach aims to enhance efficiency and growth within the company. The initiative was announced on January 14, 2026.

data.title: Dogecoin and Shiba Inu continue to rise in 2026, but Pepe memecoin leads with an 18% gain, followed by Bonk with 14%.
data.description: Specialized cryptocurrencies known as memecoins experienced significant growth on Tuesday amid a general upturn in the cryptocurrency market. One standout performer was the frog-themed memecoin Pepe, which surged over 18%, leading the way among high-cap gainers. Since the start of the year, this Ethereum-based memecoin has seen an impressive 70% increase in value.
